---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(did)

source("helper_recode_variables.R")
```

```{r}

library(plm)
```

```{r}

panel_data1 <- panel_data %>%
  filter(home_rule_ind == 1) %>%
  mutate(year_control = as.numeric(if_else(year == 2015, 0,
                                ifelse(year == 2016, 1,
                                  ifelse(year == 2017, 2,
                                    ifelse(year == 2018, 3,
                                           NA
                                           )
                                ))))) %>%
  filter(between(year_control, 0, 3))
```

```{r}

panel_data1 <- panel_data1 %>%
  mutate(reassess_year = as.numeric(reassess_year)) %>%
  mutate(agency_num = as.numeric(agency_num)) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(as.character(year))) %>%
  mutate(triad = if_else())
```

```{r, warning = F}

att1 <- att_gt(
  yname = "total_final_levy",
  tname = "reassess_year",
  idname = "agency_num",
  gname = "year_control",
  data = panel_data1,
  panel = F,
  #allow_unbalanced_panel = F,
  #control_group = "notyettreated",
  #anticipation = 0
)

summary(att1)
```

Needs to switch to 1 for all periods after the treatment in the window.
